div.p: ARIES crash recovery with mixed transaction states
ANALYSIS PHASE Scan log → build tables T1: COMMITTED ✓ T2: ABORTED ✓ T3: ACTIVE (needs undo)
REDO PHASE Replay ALL changes T1 UPDATE: page 5 = B T2 UPDATE: page 7 = Y T3 UPDATE: page 3 = Q
UNDO PHASE Rollback ACTIVE only T3: undo page 3 Q→P write CLR, write ABORT
Page 7 Value: X ↩ T2 rolled back
Page 3 Value: P ↩ T3 rolled back
